name: Finance News Watch
tagline: Scans a watchlist for finance news, filters relevance with AI, and queues finance.news items.
description:
A producer worker that searches Google Web Search for company, ticker, and market-theme updates, optionally filters the results with an editable AI relevance prompt, and publishes useful articles as `finance.news` items on the BFrost Item Bus.

It is designed for low-code use: configure Google Web Search in BFrost, choose a watchlist and categories in Jobs, then review the scan output in the worker dashboard. Informational only, never trading advice.
author: @ccascio

versions.changelog: Initial source-backed release with watchlist search, AI relevance filtering, finance.news publishing, channel notifications, dashboard output review, and low-code guidance.
